title: AdjudicationResult
description: Optional LLM adjudication results. Records the verdict of an adjudicator (LLM or heuristic) on ambiguous semantic matches from the evaluator.

run_id.description: 16-character hex run identifier linking this result to the insert_me output bundle.

tool.description: Name of the detection tool whose report was adjudicated.

adjudicator.description: Identifier for the adjudicator that produced this result, e.g. 'llm', 'heuristic', 'claude-3-5-sonnet'.

cases.description: One adjudication record per ambiguous case submitted for review.

mutation_index.description: Zero-based index into ground_truth.json mutations array.

finding_id.description: Tool-assigned finding identifier, or null if the finding has no ID.

verdict.description: Adjudicator verdict: match, no_match, or ambiguous (requires human review).

confidence.description: Adjudicator confidence in the verdict (0.0–1.0). Optional.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of the adjudicator's verdict. Optional.
